property.name: note
property.value:
Example OST from Bayonetta and Sonic Adventure 2
pmlyric's parameters have been increased to 27 here to accomadate Live and Learn's amount of unique lyrics. to get its lyrics to appear replace the lyrics at the bottom of english.txt with the following
# ----- LYRICS ------ lyric1 = "Can you feel life movin' through your mind," lyric2 = "Ooh, looks like it came back for more!" lyric3 = "Yeah yeah yeah!" lyric4 = "Can you feel time slippin' down your spine," lyric5 = "Ooooooh, You try and try to ignore!" lyric6 = "Yeah!" lyric7 = "But you can hardly swallow," lyric8 = "Your fears and pain." lyric9 = "When you can't help but follow," lyric10 = "It puts you right back where you came." lyric11 = "Live and learn!" lyric12 = "Hanging on the edge of tomorrow," lyric13 = "From the works of yesterday." lyric14 = "If you beg or if you borrow," lyric15 = "You may never find your way." lyric16 = "Whooooa, yeah!" lyric17 = "Can you feel life tangle you up inside?" lyric18 = "Yeah, now you're face down on the floor!" lyric19 = "Oh!" lyric20 = "But you can't save your sorrow," lyric21 = "You've paid in trade!" lyric22 = "Whoa, whoa, whoa," lyric23 = "Oh yeeeeeeeeeeeah!" lyric24 = "There's a face searching far, so far and wide." lyric25 = "There's a place where you dream you'd never find." lyric26 = "Hold on to what if?" lyric27 = "You may never find your way!"
